title: Casino stocks in 2023: It could come down to this region, analysts say
text: As casinos try to map out the year ahead amid concerns about inflation's impact on leisure spending, Macau's reopening could be the biggest driver of Wall Street's optimism on the sector's overall results, analysts said on Wednesday.

title: Gaming Stocks Rally On Tailwinds In World's Largest Gambling Hub
text: Gaming stocks ran at the head of rallying China-based stocks Tuesday, after data suggested Covid infections may have peaked in large cities. The post Gaming Stocks Rally On Tailwinds In World's Largest Gambling Hub appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: 2 Casino Stocks Enjoying Tailwinds After Upgrade
text: Wells Fargo upgraded Wynn Resorts, Limited (NASDAQ:WYNN) to "overweight" from "equal weight" earlier, and hiked its price target to $101 from $74.
